description: Launch readiness audit for hx-combobox. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, combobox APG pattern, aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant, aria-labelledby (NOT label for=), WCAG 2.1 AA. C-PATTERN-04: use aria-labelledby not label[for] on div[role=combobox]. (2) Astro doc page — all 12 template sections. (3) Individual export — standalone HTML works. (4) `npm run verify` passes. Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-combobox/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-combobox.md`
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-combobox
